This is a sample text document for testing the AI Harness CLI ingest pipeline.

The document contains multiple paragraphs to test chunking behavior.
Each paragraph has different content to verify text extraction works correctly.

Section 1: Introduction
The AI Harness CLI is a semantic document engine for AI agents.
It ingests documents, extracts text, chunks content, and generates embeddings.
This allows agents to retrieve relevant context from private document collections.

Section 2: Features
Key features include:
- PDF, TXT, and MD file support
- Configurable chunking with overlap
- OpenAI-compatible embedding providers
- SQLite storage with WAL mode
- Machine-readable JSON output

Section 3: Usage
To ingest a document, run: harness ingest ./path/to/file.txt
To list documents, run: harness list
To get document details, run: harness get <document_id>
To retry a failed document, run: harness retry <document_id>
